evals.prompt: Audit my Android app for battery drain and energy efficiency
evals.expected_output: Runs 7-phase Android green audit: explores architecture, profiles energy, checks Creedengo Android rules, reviews network/assets, measures SCI, produces report.
assertions: Identifies Android-specific energy drains (wake locks, Doze, radio state machine)
Checks against Creedengo Android rules (location, wake locks, sensors, alarms)
Recommends Battery Historian or Android Studio Power Profiler
Produces a structured report with methodology section

evals.prompt: Check my Kotlin code for green coding issues — we're getting Android Vitals warnings
evals.expected_output: Focuses on code patterns and Android Vitals: excessive wake-ups, stuck wake locks, Wi-Fi scans.
assertions: Checks Kotlin files against Creedengo Android energy rules
Recommends fixes for wake lock, alarm, and sensor patterns
Does not run full 7-phase audit for a code-focused request

evals.prompt: Il mio app Android consuma troppa batteria quando è in background, cosa posso fare?
evals.expected_output: Focuses on background energy: WorkManager, Doze, AlarmManager, foreground services, wake locks.
assertions: Investigates background work patterns (Services, WorkManager, AlarmManager)
Explains Doze mode and App Standby implications
Recommends replacing AlarmManager with WorkManager where possible
Suggests testing with adb shell dumpsys deviceidle force-idle
